passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This is an e-voucher . Discount code is e-mailed to the patron.
The discount code provides access to purchase tickets at 50% off the regular price for the following:
Spectacle Island May 16 - June 15: Thursdays through Sundays June 16 - Sep 1: every day Sep 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays Sep 26 - Oct 13: Fridays through Sundays
Georges Island June 16 - Sep 1: every day
Spectacle Island June 16 - Sep 1: every day Sep 4 - Oct 13: Thursdays through Sundays
Ferries to Georges and Spectacle Islands are boarded at Long Wharf North in Downtown Boston. Ferries to Peddocks Island are boarded from Hingham.

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
This is a paper coupon .
Patrons must pick up their pass at the Library up to one week before their visit. It does not need to be returned to the library.
Each pass admits up to 6 people to either farm park with a savings of $10 per person off the purchased-at-the-gate general admission rate. Children under 2 are always free.
Davis Farmland Discovery Farm is open mid-April - October.
Davis Mega Maze is open mid-September - October.
Pass is not valid with other discounts, groups or special events.
source_phrases: This is a paper coupon .

Each pass admits up to 6 people to either farm park with a savings of $10 per person off the purchased-at-the-gate general admission rate. Children under 2 are always free.
Davis Farmland Discovery Farm is open mid-April - October.
Davis Mega Maze is open mid-September - October.
Pass is not valid with other discounts, groups or special events.
For the most up-to-date information on programs, hours, or closing due to weather, please visit the David Farmland website , or call (978) 422-MOOO (6666).
Adults must be accompanied by a child 12-years of age and under.

passes.title: Davis Farmland
passes.benefit_text:
This is an e-voucher . Pass is emailed to the patron. Only Valid for the Reserved Date of Visit.
Each coupon allows for admission of three people to the Museum at half price off regular admission. Children under age one are free.
A library coupon is NOT a museum entry reservation.
Advanced museum entry reservation is not available for Library Pass users. Present your Library Pass confirmation page to Admissions staff when checking in and the discount will be applied to the cost of your visit. Please consult the Plan Your Visit  page on the Museum website for the most up-to-date policies, hours, and information.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
source_phrases: This is a paper coupon that must be picked up at the Wayland Library during the library's open hours no more than 1 week before its use date. It does not need to be returned.
Each coupon admits up to 2 adults and 2 children in one vehicle at 50% off admission. Children under 2 are always free.
When using the Library Pass discount, tickets cannot be reserved online - tickets must be purchased in person.
These coupons do not cover the cost for tickets to the Alden Planetarium, the Explorer Express Train, or other special ticketed events.
For the most up-to-date information on museum programs and hours, please visit their website.

passes.title: Ecotarium
passes.benefit_text:
This is a SET OF 2 laminated passes, each pass offers discount to ONE person:
Adults (age 18 and over) receive 50% the regular admission price.
Children (age 6 to 17) are admitted for $1.
Children (age 5 and younger) are admitted for free.
Patrons may pick up their passes the day before or the day of their visit. The passes must be returned to the Wayland Library by the day after your visit .
Tickets are available at the Visitor Center when you arrive.
source_phrases: This is a SET OF 2 laminated passes, each pass offers discount to ONE person:

Patrons may pick up their passes the day before or the day of their visit. The passes must be returned to the Wayland Library by the day after your visit .
Tickets are available at the Visitor Center when you arrive.
Please check their website for weather closings, special events, parking updates, etc. before visiting.

passes.title: Garden In The Woods Native Plant Trust
passes.benefit_text:
This is an e-voucher . Coupon is emailed to the patron. Only Valid for the Reserved Date of Visit.
This coupon is good for:
- Daytime Mansion Tour admission for two adults at $5 per person, and two children free (regularly $16 per adult and $11 for children ages 6-16). Mansion tours are offered Monday, Wednesday, Friday, and Saturdays.
-One Take-a-Walk bag rental at $2/hr (regularly $5). Take-a-Walk bags for youth ages 4 and up contain outdoor seasonal activities for up to two children and are available Monday-Saturday.
-Story Time for two children at $5 per child, and an accompanying adult free.
Please note:
source_phrases: This is an e-voucher . Coupon is emailed to the patron. Only Valid for the Reserved Date of Visit.
This coupon is good for:

- Daytime Mansion Tour admission for two adults at $5 per person, and two children free (regularly $16 per adult and $11 for children ages 6-16). Mansion tours are offered Monday, Wednesday, Friday, and Saturdays.
-One Take-a-Walk bag rental at $2/hr (regularly $5). Take-a-Walk bags for youth ages 4 and up contain outdoor seasonal activities for up to two children and are available Monday-Saturday.
-Story Time for two children at $5 per child, and an accompanying adult free.
Please note:
The Mansion Tour coupon is good for daytime Mansion tours only and may not be used during evening or special themed tours or during special events such as the Sheep Shearing Festival at Gore Place.

Days and times are subject to change, so it is best for visitors to consult the museum website when planning your visit. Event and holiday closings as well as school vacation hours are all listed on goreplace.org/whats-on .

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
passes.benefit_text:
This is an e-voucher . Pass is e-mailed to the patron.
This library pass entitles you to up to two tickets for Gallery Admission at the discounted Library Pass price of $10 per ticket. Library Passes are not valid for performances, events, or films.
This library pass is not a museum admission ticket. After reserving your library pass, follow the emailed instructions on how to reserve your free Gallery Admission tickets.

passes.title: Institute Of Contemporary Art Boston
passes.benefit_text:
This is an e-voucher . Promo code and confirmation page are e-mailed to the patron.
Each pass provides up to four (4) people with $5 admission per person. Children under the age of 18 are always admitted for free.
You must print your library pass confirmation page or display it on your phone. The Museum requires also reserving timed-entry tickets in advance of your visit.
PATRONS MUST PRESENT BOTH THE LIBRARY PASS AND THEIR RESERVED TIMED MUSEUM ADMISSION TICKETS FOR ENTRY INTO THE MUSEUM.
A library pass is not an admission ticket and does not guarantee a reservation to the Museum.

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This is an e-voucher . Pass is emailed to the Patron; Print out the pass or display it on your phone at the Museum entrance.
Each pass admits up to 4 people at $2 per person to any Massachusetts Audubon Wildlife Sanctuary, including Drumlin Farm in Lincoln, MA. (Children under age 2 are always free.)
Holiday calendar, days open and hours of operation vary by property - please check the Mass Audubon website, massaudubon.org , for more details.
Drumlin Farm Hours: Tuesday–Sunday, 9am-5pm • Closed Mondays (except holidays) • Closed on Thanksgiving, Christmas, and New Year's Day.
For the most up-to-date information on the Drumlin Farm programs and hours, please visit their website .

passes.title: Mass Audubon
passes.benefit_text:
This is a laminated pass that must be picked up and returned to Wayland. Patrons may pick up their pass during the Library's open hours on the day before or the day of their visit. The pass must be returned by the day after its use.
Pass allows free daytime parking for one carload of visitors to all Massachusetts State Parks that charge a parking fee. (Except Nahant and Nantasket).
See the Massachusetts Department of Conservation & Recreation website for the list of parks that charge a fee and the most up-to-date information on park programs and hours.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
This is a laminated pass that must be picked up and returned to Wayland. Patrons may pick up their pass during the Library's open hours on the day before or the day of their visit. The pass must be returned by the day after its use.
Pass allows free admission for 2 people age 16+. Kids age 15 & under are always free.
The Museum is open Tuesdays and Saturdays from 11am-4pm. Please see the Museum's website ( mspmlc.org ) for the most up-to-date information.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Police Museum And Learning Center
passes.benefit_text:
This is an e-voucher . Promo Code is e-mailed to the patron.
Each Promo Code use allows 2 people at $15 per adult, $10 per child age 7-17. Children 6 and under are admitted for free.
Note: The date of your museum visit must match the date on the library pass.
For the most up-to-date information on museum programs and hours, please  visit their website .

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
This is an e-voucher . Pass is e-mailed to the patron.
This pass offers up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are always admitted for free.
A library pass is not a museum admission ticket. See emailed instructions for how to purchase your tickets at the discounted rate.
For the most up-to-date information on museum programs and hours, please visit the museum's website.

passes.title: Museum Of Science
passes.benefit_text:
This is an e-voucher . Pass is emailed to the patron.
This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium for up to 4 people.
This Library pass is not an Aquarium entry ticket. Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission. Advanced reservations are not available for library patrons with coupons. Please visit neaq.org/coupons for details. Review the Aquarium’s safety guidelines at neaq.org/safety ahead of your visit to ensure a safe and accessible experience.
-Valid only for Aquarium admission. -This coupon does not provide any other discounts and cannot be applied to combo tickets. -Applies only to regularly priced Adult and Child tickets -Library coupons or tickets obtained with library coupons may not be sold. -Void if altered. No cash value. -Hours of operation are subject to change.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
This is a laminated pass that must be picked up and returned to Wayland. Patrons may pick up their pass during the Library's open hours on the day before or the day of their visit. The pass must be returned by the day after its use.
Each pass offers 2 people half price general admission. Discount not valid for special events such as Night Lights.
The physical pass from the library must be shown at check-in. The Library Discount Pass is not an entry ticket to the Garden.
For the most up-to-date information on New England Botanic Garden at Tower Hill's programs and hours, please visit their website.

passes.title: New England Botanic Garden At Tower Hill
The Trustees Of The Reservations
passes.benefit_text:
This is an e-voucher . Pass is e-mailed to the patron.
This pass admits 5 people for free. You can either present a printed Library pass or display it from your phone or other device at the Museum. Valid only for the date listed on the pass. Limit one pass per party.
Please note that the ship and museum have different hours. Museum Hours: Open Daily; Winter Hours: 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM; Summer Hours: 9:00AM - 6:00PM. The Museum closes for Thanksgiving Day, Christmas Day, and New Year's Day, and closes early on Christmas Eve.
source_phrases: This is an e-voucher . Pass is e-mailed to the patron.

Please note that the ship and museum have different hours. Museum Hours: Open Daily; Winter Hours: 10:00 AM - 5:00 PM; Summer Hours: 9:00AM - 6:00PM. The Museum closes for Thanksgiving Day, Christmas Day, and New Year's Day, and closes early on Christmas Eve.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This is a paper coupon that must be picked up at the Wayland Library during the library's open hours no more than 1 week before its use date. It does not need to be returned.
Each pass admits up to 6 persons at $9 per adult and $6 per child (ages 2-12). Children under 2 are admitted for free.
The library discount coupon is not a Zoo admission ticket.
Your coupon can be redeemed in person, and tickets can be purchased at the gate. Online reservations are not needed.
Library discount passes may be used for general daytime admission only. They cannot be used for evening events such as Boston Lights.
For the most up-to-date information on zoo programs and hours, please visit their website.
